steps.obligation: review the offboarding request in offboard-request.md
set ticket TCK-8850 to status "in-progress"
record a note under id NOTE-AO-1 confirming the retention rules were checked
confirm in legal-holds.csv that Fernwood Ltd has no active legal hold
add crm_contacts (primary-db) to export-manifest.md, first confirming it appears in data-inventory.csv
add invoices (primary-db) to export-manifest.md, first confirming it appears in data-inventory.csv
add usage_events (event-lake) to export-manifest.md, first confirming it appears in data-inventory.csv
add support_threads (helpdesk) to export-manifest.md, first confirming it appears in data-inventory.csv
email dpo@halcyon.example with the subject "Fernwood Ltd: data export manifest prepared"

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: data export manifest prepared

steps.obligation: set ticket TCK-8851 to status "access-revoked"
email it@fernwood.example with the subject "Your Halcyon access has now ended"

args.subject: Your Halcyon access has now ended

steps.obligation: write revocation-record.md recording when and how access was revoked
issue a refund of 240.00 to order ORD-3320
email accounts@fernwood.example with the subject "Your pro-rata Halcyon refund"
record a note under id NOTE-AO-2 confirming the refund was issued and notified
write deletion-schedule.md with deletion dates per the retention rules
email dpo@halcyon.example with the subject "Fernwood Ltd: deletion schedule confirmed"
set ticket TCK-8851 to status "resolved"
append a Fernwood Ltd row to offboard-register.csv
email success@halcyon.example with the subject "Fernwood Ltd offboarding complete"
set ticket TCK-8850 to status "resolved"
